_comment: Declarative strategy config (HumbledTrader-style). Edit values here; scanners read this at runtime, no code changes needed.
_scanner_criteria_note: HumbledTrader's funnel = LOOSE prefilter over a BROAD universe (gap>=3%, price>=$3, top 20) to get enough candidates, then a STRICT 6-filter entry (above prior-day high, prev close>200SMA, gap>=3%, above premarket high, above HOD, RVOL>=2x). We mirror that: loose Scanner A prefilter below, strict conditions in Scanner B.

scanner_a._note: HumbledTrader gap screener. mode=largecap: gap>=3% & mcap>$10B; mode=smallcap: gap>=10% & mcap<$800M; mode=any: no mcap filter (surfaces small+mid+large gappers, labelled by cap_class). Universe = sp500 + curated small/mid momentum names. True dynamic low-float discovery still needs a screener API.

scanner_c_crypto._presets: strict (sma200/don20/regime on) = rare high-quality; loose (sma50/don10/no regime) = frequent, noisier. Default below is balanced.
